title: senecio volcanicola
intro: Senecio volcanicola, also known as the volcanic groundsel, is a plant species native to New Zealand, characterized by its distinctive, woolly leaves and small, yellow flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Senecio volcanicola has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, skin conditions, and digestive issues, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of Senecio volcanicola can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
